sales.description:
ARCADIUS, A.D. 383-408. AV Solidus (4.45 gms), Constantinople Mint, 7th Officina, ca. 395-402. NGC AU, Strike: 5/5 Surface: 2/5. Brushed.
To view all items from the Peter Jones M.D. Collection, click  here.
RIC-7; Depeyrot-55/1. Obverse: Helmeted pearl-diademed cuirassed bust facing, holding spear over right shoulder, shield adorned with horseman riding down enemy on left; Reverse: Helmeted Constantinopolis seated facing, head right, holding scepter in right hand, Victory on globe in left, rig...
